author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Fixed 8 unsafe .data() calls on GPU tensors. Transcendental ops (exp/sin/cos/clamp) now use into_storage_and_shape() to preserve GPU storage instead of calling .data().to_vec(). Indexing ops (IndexSelectBackward, MaskedFillBackward, index_select_1d, masked_fill) now transfer to CPU before .data(). Full audit confirmed autograd engine, shape ops, linalg, arithmetic, activation, and reduction backward paths were already safe.
